characters.name: KASS KIISU
characters.description: Väike hall triibuline kass, roheliste silmadega, kandmas väikest sinist lipsukest kaelal. Sõbralik ja uudishimulik näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: KOER KUKI
characters.description: Väike pruun karvane koer, rippuvate kõrvadega, kandmas väikest punast kaelarihma. Rõõmus ja mänguhimuline näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: Käsitöönurk
locations.description: Cozy children's craft corner with light blue walls and a light wooden floor. A small, round, light wooden table sits in the center with two small wooden chairs. On the back wall, there's a single window showing bright green spring trees outside. A small red bookshelf is against the left wall. Warm sunlight streams in from the window. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Kass Kiisu, a small grey striped cat with green eyes, wearing a small blue bow tie, sits on a small wooden chair at a round light wooden table. Koer Kuki, a small brown furry dog with floppy ears, wearing a small red collar, sits on another small wooden chair next to Kiisu. They are looking at each other happily. The cozy children's craft corner has light blue walls and a light wooden floor. A single window on the back wall shows bright green spring trees outside. A small red bookshelf is against the left wall. Warm sunlight streams in from the window. Cartoon style.

Kass Kiisu and Koer Kuki are sitting at the round light wooden table in the cozy children's craft corner. Kiisu has one paw on the table, looking thoughtful, and Kuki is looking at Kiisu with a curious expression. The table is empty. The cozy children's craft corner has light blue walls and a light wooden floor. A single window on the back wall shows bright green spring trees outside. A small red bookshelf is against the left wall. Warm sunlight streams in from the window. Cartoon style.

Kass Kiisu is carefully placing a white egg onto the round light wooden table. Koer Kuki is bringing another white egg towards the table, holding it gently in his mouth. Several more white eggs are in a small basket on the floor next to them. The cozy children's craft corner has light blue walls and a light wooden floor. A single window on the back wall shows bright green spring trees outside. A small red bookshelf is against the left wall. Warm sunlight streams in from the window. Cartoon style.

Kass Kiisu sits at the round light wooden table, holding a small paintbrush and carefully painting a white egg with bright blue paint. Koer Kuki sits next to Kiisu, also holding a small paintbrush and painting another white egg with bright red paint. There are several small pots of colorful paint on the table. A few unpainted eggs are also on the table. The cozy children's craft corner has light blue walls and a light wooden floor. A single window on the back wall shows bright green spring trees outside. A small red bookshelf is against the left wall. Warm sunlight streams in from the window. Cartoon style.

Kass Kiisu and Koer Kuki are sitting at the round light wooden table. Kiisu holds up a brightly painted blue egg and Kuki holds up a brightly painted red egg. Both characters are smiling and looking admiringly at their colorful eggs. Several other painted eggs in various bright colors are on the table along with the paint pots and paintbrushes. The cozy children's craft corner has light blue walls and a light wooden floor. A single window on the back wall shows bright green spring trees outside. A small red bookshelf is against the left wall. Warm sunlight streams in from the window. Cartoon style.

Kass Kiisu carefully sprinkles glitter from a small container onto a brightly painted yellow egg on the round light wooden table. Koer Kuki watches with excitement, holding a small pot of glitter ready to use. Several brightly painted eggs are on the table, some with glitter already on them. The paint pots and paintbrushes are still on the table. The cozy children's craft corner has light blue walls and a light wooden floor. A single window on the back wall shows bright green spring trees outside. A small red bookshelf is against the left wall. Warm sunlight streams in from the window. Cartoon style.

Kass Kiisu and Koer Kuki stand proudly next to the round light wooden table, which is now filled with many beautifully decorated Easter eggs. The eggs are painted in various bright colors and sparkle with glitter. The paint pots and glitter containers are neatly put aside. The cozy children's craft corner has light blue walls and a light wooden floor. A single window on the back wall shows bright green spring trees outside. A small red bookshelf is against the left wall. Warm sunlight streams in from the window. Cartoon style.

Kass Kiisu and Koer Kuki are smiling brightly and giving each other a friendly high-five (paw-five). They are standing beside the round light wooden table, which is beautifully arranged with all the decorated Easter eggs. The colorful eggs are shining under the warm sunlight. The cozy children's craft corner has light blue walls and a light wooden floor. A single window on the back wall shows bright green spring trees outside. A small red bookshelf is against the left wall. Warm sunlight streams in from the window. Cartoon style.
